column1: # Xteink X4 stock-compatible dual-OTA layout (16 MB flash).
# This mirrors the partition table a stock/locked X4 already has in flash
# our app boots under the *stock* second-stage bootloader (which just boots
# whatever `otadata` selects) and so both OTA slots exist for in-app updates
# and a recovery hatch. Our app image goes in ota_0 at 0x10000 — the same
# offset the web flasher and `esptool write_flash 0x10000` target.
